Hello {{ vendor.brand_name }},

Welcome to ComraidShops Curated Vendors

We are delighted to inform you that your vendor application has been approved.

Your brand has met our editorial standards, and your account is now fully active. You can begin submitting your premium products for review and curating your brand portfolio on the platform.

We look forward to showcasing your pieces to our community.

Best regards,
